channel.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing
channel.description: A daily two-host briefing on the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific — Singapore, Southeast Asia, India and beyond. Hosted by Maya and Theo.
channel.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
channel.itunes:summary: A daily two-host briefing on the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific — Singapore, Southeast Asia, India and beyond. Hosted by Maya and Theo.

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Tuesday, June 23, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Before SpaceX IPO, investors in China secretly acquired stakes
  • BP, Marathon, 7-Eleven, Walmart sued for allegedly using AI to boost California gas prices
  • China sanctions US defense, rare earth firms in retaliation
  • Where football meets mentorship: How a grassroots initiative is uplifting young lives beyond the pitch

Sources:

  • Asia Times
  • Channel NewsAsia
  • Asia Times
  • The Straits Times
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Before SpaceX IPO, investors in China secretly acquired stakes
  • BP, Marathon, 7-Eleven, Walmart sued for allegedly using AI to boost California gas prices
  • China sanctions US defense, rare earth firms in retaliation
  • Where football meets mentorship: How a grassroots initiative is uplifting young lives beyond the pitch

Sources:

  • Asia Times
  • Channel NewsAsia
  • Asia Times
  • The Straits Times
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Tuesday, June 23, 2026

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Monday, June 22, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Serena Williams returns to Wimbledon singles draw
  • Brexit at 10: Why Britain is still divided over leaving European Union
  • Over 370 domestic helpers trained in caregiving pilot programme, including dementia care
  • Young Punjab kids ‘rich for 4 yrs after selling their lands… then broke’: World Bank's Ajay Banga on urban agri economy

Sources:

  • Economic Times
  • Times of India Business
  • The Straits Times
  • Mint Economy
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Serena Williams returns to Wimbledon singles draw
  • Brexit at 10: Why Britain is still divided over leaving European Union
  • Over 370 domestic helpers trained in caregiving pilot programme, including dementia care
  • Young Punjab kids ‘rich for 4 yrs after selling their lands… then broke’: World Bank's Ajay Banga on urban agri economy

Sources:

  • Economic Times
  • Times of India Business
  • The Straits Times
  • Mint Economy
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Monday, June 22, 2026

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Sunday, June 21, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash in France
  • Trump blames reflecting pool woes on vandalism, but offers no proof
  • 3 Indian-flagged oil tankers cross Strait of Hormuz, head home with 94 crew members
  • Australia poised to become an Asia-Pacific energy superpower

Sources:

  • South China Morning Post
  • South China Morning Post
  • Times of India Business
  • Asia Times
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash in France
  • Trump blames reflecting pool woes on vandalism, but offers no proof
  • 3 Indian-flagged oil tankers cross Strait of Hormuz, head home with 94 crew members
  • Australia poised to become an Asia-Pacific energy superpower

Sources:

  • South China Morning Post
  • South China Morning Post
  • Times of India Business
  • Asia Times
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Sunday, June 21, 2026

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Friday, June 19, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Exclusive-Canadian lender TD tells some employees it will use software to monitor their work
  • SC declares the right to walk carefree on footpaths a fundamental right
  • Japan seeks G7 price floors to break China’s rare earth grip
  • 2 trains collide north of London, killing 1 and injuring dozens

Sources:

  • Channel NewsAsia
  • The Hindu Business Line
  • Asia Times
  • South China Morning Post
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Exclusive-Canadian lender TD tells some employees it will use software to monitor their work
  • SC declares the right to walk carefree on footpaths a fundamental right
  • Japan seeks G7 price floors to break China’s rare earth grip
  • 2 trains collide north of London, killing 1 and injuring dozens

Sources:

  • Channel NewsAsia
  • The Hindu Business Line
  • Asia Times
  • South China Morning Post
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Friday, June 19, 2026

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Thursday, June 18, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Cuba unveils historic package of free-market reforms
  • Trump’s Iran deal extends ceasefire, opens Hormuz
  • India faces melting glaciers as Asia warms up
  • SpaceX bankers prepare for bond sale of at least $20 billion

Sources:

  • South China Morning Post
  • The Hindu Business Line
  • Economic Times
  • Economic Times Markets
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Cuba unveils historic package of free-market reforms
  • Trump’s Iran deal extends ceasefire, opens Hormuz
  • India faces melting glaciers as Asia warms up
  • SpaceX bankers prepare for bond sale of at least $20 billion

Sources:

  • South China Morning Post
  • The Hindu Business Line
  • Economic Times
  • Economic Times Markets
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Thursday, June 18, 2026

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Wednesday, June 17, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Trump likes Canada’s Chinese EV deal, Carney says after chat caught on hot mic
  • Prince George joins Eton's $85K school
  • Musk’s AI tool Grok was used to help fire 2,000 munitions at Iran
  • ‘High energy costs strain Asean homes’

Sources:

  • South China Morning Post
  • Economic Times
  • Asia Times
  • Philippine Star Business
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Trump likes Canada’s Chinese EV deal, Carney says after chat caught on hot mic
  • Prince George joins Eton's $85K school
  • Musk’s AI tool Grok was used to help fire 2,000 munitions at Iran
  • ‘High energy costs strain Asean homes’

Sources:

  • South China Morning Post
  • Economic Times
  • Asia Times
  • Philippine Star Business
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Wednesday, June 17, 2026

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Tuesday, June 16, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Your body is fighting your diet – here’s the science that explains why
  • SpaceX options trading debut draws record volume as investors chase rocket stock
  • Latin America and Europe are bystanders in the US-China AI race, says Lula’s top adviser
  • US uses Iranian-style ship-to-ship tactic to move oil out of Gulf

Sources:

  • The Straits Times
  • Economic Times Markets
  • South China Morning Post
  • The Hindu Business Line
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Your body is fighting your diet – here’s the science that explains why
  • SpaceX options trading debut draws record volume as investors chase rocket stock
  • Latin America and Europe are bystanders in the US-China AI race, says Lula’s top adviser
  • US uses Iranian-style ship-to-ship tactic to move oil out of Gulf

Sources:

  • The Straits Times
  • Economic Times Markets
  • South China Morning Post
  • The Hindu Business Line
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Tuesday, June 16, 2026

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Tuesday, June 16, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Philippines vows to block structures at Scarborough Shoal amid fears of Chinese expansion
  • Is China sleepwalking down Japan’s zombie economy path?
  • Struggling Pizza Hut to be sold for $2.7 billion
  • EU rules out mandate to keep video games playable, seeks voluntary code

Sources:

  • South China Morning Post
  • Asia Times
  • Economic Times
  • Channel NewsAsia
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Philippines vows to block structures at Scarborough Shoal amid fears of Chinese expansion
  • Is China sleepwalking down Japan’s zombie economy path?
  • Struggling Pizza Hut to be sold for $2.7 billion
  • EU rules out mandate to keep video games playable, seeks voluntary code

Sources:

  • South China Morning Post
  • Asia Times
  • Economic Times
  • Channel NewsAsia
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Tuesday, June 16, 2026

item.title: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Tuesday, June 16, 2026
item.description:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Brent oil price drops under $80 on US-Iran deal
  • Struggling Pizza Hut to be sold for $2.7 billion
  • Philippines vows to block structures at Scarborough Shoal amid fears of Chinese expansion
  • Is China sleepwalking down Japan’s zombie economy path?

Sources:

  • Economic Times Markets
  • Economic Times
  • South China Morning Post
  • Asia Times
item.content:encoded:
Today on The APAC Brief, Maya and Theo break down the most interesting business and economy stories across Asia-Pacific.

In this episode:

  • Brent oil price drops under $80 on US-Iran deal
  • Struggling Pizza Hut to be sold for $2.7 billion
  • Philippines vows to block structures at Scarborough Shoal amid fears of Chinese expansion
  • Is China sleepwalking down Japan’s zombie economy path?

Sources:

  • Economic Times Markets
  • Economic Times
  • South China Morning Post
  • Asia Times
item.itunes:author: Daniel Burmester
item.itunes:summary: Your Daily APAC Business and Strategy Briefing — Tuesday, June 16, 2026
